creator: fbsd@opal.com
text:
Created attachment 210889
shar archive of initial port version

Upstream development of the X11 theme in our existing port x11-themes/xfce-evolution has been ended and the project has been renamed to ClassicLooks.

Please remove the port x11-themes/xfce-evolution.

Please include an entry in MOVED:
    x11-themes/xfce-evolution|x11-themes/classiclooks|2019-09-23|Project renamed

The shar file attached here is the new x11-themes/classiclooks port.
